title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.625 - Application, procedure
text:
486.625.  Application, procedure. — 1.  Every application for a notary commission shall be made in a paper or electronic format established by the secretary and shall include all information required by section 486.630 and any other information as the secretary may deem appropriate.
  2.  A current or former notary applying for a new notary commission shall submit a new completed application and comply anew with all of the provisions of this section and sections 486.605 and 486.615.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
